did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Scott Chesney's Gay Games 94 and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Programs, fliers, handouts, event-specific magazines, newspapers, broadsides, and other memorabilia from the Gay Games 94 in New York City, and the Stonewall 25 March.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Gay Games participant, member of New York Ice, the hockey team.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, fliers, handouts, event-specific magazines, newspapers, broasides, and other memorabilia from the Gay Games 94 in New York City, and the Stonewall 25 March.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Barbara Neal's Gay Games memorabilia, #7584. Arthur S. Leonard's Gay Games and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia, #7585

did.unittitle: Atlantis Events Incorporated "Atlantis at Club Med Resorts" catalogue
The New York Triangle Volume 1, Number 1 (Tuesday, June 21, 1994) "GAY GAMES BEGIN!"
Miscellaneous Handouts for Events and Promotions at Gay Games IV/Stonewall 25
Miscellaneous Handouts for Gay Games IV and V
The Games Guide--The Official Guide to all Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival Events

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Scott Chesney's Gay Games 94 and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia, #7583. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
